createaccount.name: CreateAccount
createaccount.description: Grants permission to create an AWS account through the AWS Management Console sign-up flow

authenticate.name: Authenticate
authenticate.description: Grants permission to authenticate to the AWS Management Console

authorizeoauth2access.name: AuthorizeOAuth2Access
authorizeoauth2access.description: Grants permission to authenticate through a browser and obtain an OAuth 2.0 authorization code for credential exchange

createoauth2publicclient.name: CreateOAuth2PublicClient
createoauth2publicclient.description: Grants permission to dynamically register an OAuth 2.0 public client for use with AWS Sign-In

createoauth2token.name: CreateOAuth2Token
createoauth2token.description: Grants permission to exchange an authorization code for OAuth 2.0 access token and refresh token that can be used to access AWS services from developer tools and applications

createtrustedidentitypropagationapplicat.name: CreateTrustedIdentityPropagationApplicationForConsole
createtrustedidentitypropagationapplicat.description: Grants permission to create an Identity Center application that represents the AWS Management Console on an Identity Center organization instance

deleteconsoleauthorizationconfiguration.name: DeleteConsoleAuthorizationConfiguration
deleteconsoleauthorizationconfiguration.description: Grants permission to disable console authorization configuration for an AWS account or organization

deleteresourcepermissionstatement.name: DeleteResourcePermissionStatement
deleteresourcepermissionstatement.description: Grants permission to remove a permission statement from the account's SignIn Resource Based Policy

getconsoleauthorizationconfiguration.name: GetConsoleAuthorizationConfiguration
getconsoleauthorizationconfiguration.description: Grants permission to retrieve console authorization configuration for an AWS account or organization

getresourcepolicy.name: GetResourcePolicy
getresourcepolicy.description: Grants permission to retrieve SignIn Resource Based Policy document that is attached with your account

introspectoauth2token.name: IntrospectOAuth2Token
introspectoauth2token.description: Grants permission to inspect the metadata and active state of an OAuth 2.0 access token or refresh token

listresourcepermissionstatements.name: ListResourcePermissionStatements
listresourcepermissionstatements.description: Grants permission to list the SignIn Resource Based Policy statements in your account

listtrustedidentitypropagationapplicatio.name: ListTrustedIdentityPropagationApplicationsForConsole
listtrustedidentitypropagationapplicatio.description: Grants permission to list all Identity Center applications that represent the AWS Management Console

putconsoleauthorizationconfiguration.name: PutConsoleAuthorizationConfiguration
putconsoleauthorizationconfiguration.description: Grants permission to enable console authorization configuration for an AWS account or organization

putresourcepermissionstatement.name: PutResourcePermissionStatement
putresourcepermissionstatement.description: Grants permission to create a permission statement in the account's SignIn resource-based policy

revokeoauth2token.name: RevokeOAuth2Token
revokeoauth2token.description: Grants permission to revoke an OAuth 2.0 refresh token and its associated refresh tokens
